About: It is about a carriage or car for hire.
Affects: It affects the mechanical integrity and driver knowledge in London.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with London and Britain.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the category of hackney carriages.
BuiltBy: It was built by the London Electric Vehicle Company.
BuiltIn: It was built primarily for the London market.
CausedBy: It is caused by the need for a symbol of London and Britain.
ComposedBy: It was composed by the need for a symbol of London and Britain.
ConsistsOf: It consists of unique vehicles built primarily for the London market.
CreatedAround: It was created around the end of the Second World War.
CreatedBy: It was created by the need for a symbol of London and Britain.
CreatedFor: It was created for the London market.
CreatedTo: It was created to be a symbol of London and Britain.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Transport for London.
HasA: It has roof signs reading TAXI that are illuminated to indicate their availability for passengers.
It has broad rear doors that open very wide or slide.
It has an electrically controlled ramp that is extended for access.
It has a turning circle not greater than 8.535 m.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by rigorous mechanical integrity and driver knowledge.
It is characterized by being a symbol of London and Britain.
It is characterized by its unique vehicle design for the London market.
It is characterized by strict Conditions of Fitness mandated by Transport for London.
It is characterized by its standard color of black since the end of the Second World War.
It is characterized by its broad rear doors that open very wide or slide.
It is characterized by an electrically controlled ramp for access.
It is characterized by a turning circle not greater than 8.535 m.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the need for mechanical integrity and driver knowledge.
